name: crowdsec
title: CrowdSec
description: Community-powered intrusion prevention system. Analyzes logs, detects attacks, blocks malicious IPs, and shares threat intelligence with the CrowdSec network. Modern Fail2ban alternative.

variables.name: PORT_CROWDSEC
variables.label: Local API Port
variables.description: Port for the CrowdSec Local API (used by bouncers)
